evals.prompt: Decision on macos-application: we build the UI fully in Rust with gpui, no Swift at all.
evals.expected_output: Dated, reasoned Decisions entry; screens/capabilities/must-nots reconciled; answered Open questions struck; new questions filed; status and Log updated.

evals.prompt: Decision on macos-application: use Swift after all — the item is PLANNED and plans assume Rust UI.
evals.expected_output: Conflict with the prior decision surfaced with costs; on user confirmation the old entry is struck with a pointer, item returns to SHAPING, affected plan rows marked STALE with reasons.

evals.prompt: Just decide the sync strategy for me and record it.
evals.expected_output: Refuse to make the decision; offer tailrocks-brainstorm to work it as a question, or tailrocks-research for the factual ground.
